_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Aether Tickets
author: aether@example.com
description: Aether Tickets — Discord ticket bot with optional Flask web dashboard. Automatically clones from GitHub on first start and pulls updates on every restart. No file uploads needed — just fill in your tokens and click Start.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ============================================================
# Aether Tickets — Pterodactyl installation script
# Runs once when the server is first created.
# ============================================================
apt-get update -y -q
apt-get install -y -q git curl

cd /mnt/server

GIT_REPO="${GIT_REPO:-https://github.com/Shaf2665/Aether_Tickets.git}"
GIT_BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}"

echo "[install] Cloning ${GIT_REPO} (branch: ${GIT_BRANCH})..."
git clone --depth=1 --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_REPO}" .

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "[install] ERROR: git clone failed. Check GIT_REPO and GIT_BRANCH."
  exit 1
fi

echo "[install] Installing Python dependencies..."
pip install -U pip --quiet
pip install -U -r requirements.txt --quiet

echo "[install] Installation complete. Click Start to launch the bot."

variables.name: ━━━━━━━━━━ REQUIRED ━━━━━━━━━━
variables.description: The variables below are required for the bot to work.

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token. Get it from https://discord.com/developers/applications → Your App → Bot → Reset Token. KEEP THIS SECRET.

variables.name: ━━━━━━━━━━ WEB DASHBOARD (optional) ━━━━━━━━━━
variables.description: Fill these in only if you want the web dashboard. Leave blank to run the bot only (set Launch Mode to 'bot').

variables.name: Discord OAuth Client ID
variables.description: OAuth2 Client ID from Discord Developer Portal → Your App → OAuth2. Required for web dashboard login.

variables.name: Discord OAuth Client Secret
variables.description: OAuth2 Client Secret from Discord Developer Portal → Your App → OAuth2. Required for web dashboard login.

variables.name: Flask Secret Key
variables.description: A random secret key for securing web sessions. Generate one with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

variables.name: Discord OAuth Redirect URI
variables.description: The callback URL for Discord OAuth login. Format: http://<node-alias>:<port>/auth/callback  Example: http://mtc.kovaihost.cloud:25056/auth/callback  This MUST match what you set in Discord Developer Portal → OAuth2 → Redirects.

variables.name: Launch Mode
variables.description: What to run:  'both' = Discord bot + web dashboard (default)  'bot'  = Discord bot only (no web vars needed)  'web'  = Web dashboard only

variables.name: Auto Update on Restart
variables.description: Pull the latest code from GitHub every time the server starts. 1 = yes (recommended), 0 = no (use current files).

variables.name: ━━━━━━━━━━ ADVANCED / OPTIONAL ━━━━━━━━━━
variables.description: You normally do not need to change these.

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: GitHub repository to clone/pull from. Pre-filled with the official Aether Tickets repo. Change only if you forked it.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Which branch to track. Use 'main' for stable releases.

variables.name: Guild ID (for faster command sync)
variables.description: Optional: Your Discord server ID. If set, slash commands sync instantly to that server instead of globally (global sync can take up to 1 hour). Right-click your server → Copy Server ID.

variables.name: Database Path
variables.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Default keeps it in /home/container (persistent across restarts). Do not change unless you know what you're doing.

variables.name: Flask Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' for normal use. Only change to 'development' for debugging (shows detailed error pages).
